Co-Brand Standards
Design Guide

The definitive reference for integrating GALS Foundation and RootWork Framework branding across digital products, web applications, printed materials, and co-branded partnerships. Use these tokens, components, and rules as the single source of truth.

GALS FoundationLead Sponsor
CECSC / RWFWProgram Operator
v1.0 · 2025Current Version
Letter + DigitalPrint & Web Ready
Logo System

Logo Lockups

Four approved co-brand lockup configurations for different contexts. Never combine the logos outside these approved arrangements. Minimum clear space is equal to the height of the "×" divider on all sides.

×
Horizontal — Dark BG
Primary co-brand lockup.
Use on dark green surfaces.
×
Horizontal — Light BG
Secondary lockup.
Use on canvas/white surfaces.
×
Stacked — Dark BG
Use in square/vertical
constrained spaces.
GALS FOUNDATION
×
ROOTWORK FRAMEWORK
Text-Only Lockup
When image logos unavailable.
Headers, footers, metadata.
Clear Space Rule: Always maintain a minimum clear space around both logos equal to the height of the "×" divider. Never place logos on busy photographic backgrounds without a dark overlay.

Typography

Type System

Two-typeface system. Playfair Display for all display, heading, and editorial uses. DM Sans for all body, UI, label, and functional text. DM Mono for code, tokens, and data.

DISPLAY — Playfair Display · font-weight: 900 · use: hero titles, section heads
The RootWork Framework
H1 — Playfair Display · 32px · 700 · use: page-level headings
Dual-Purpose Pedagogy for the AI Age
H2 — Playfair Display · 24px · 700 · use: section headings
The 5Rs: A Neurologically Grounded Sequence
H3 — Playfair Display · 18px · 700 · use: subsection, card titles
TRACE Innovation Cycle
BODY — DM Sans · 15px · 400 · use: all body copy
No learning experience is designed for content delivery alone. Every RootWork lesson simultaneously attends to the learner's regulatory state, relational safety, and sense of identity and belonging — because these are not preconditions for learning. They are constitutive elements of it.
LABEL / EYEBROW — DM Sans · 10px · 600 · uppercase · 0.14em tracking
Color System
PULL QUOTE — Playfair Display · 18px · italic · on dark BG
"Where Healing Meets Innovation — and Every Learner Becomes a Knowledge Producer."
CODE / TOKEN — DM Mono · 12px · use: CSS vars, code blocks, hex values
--gold-leaf: #C9A84C; --evergreen: #082A19; --gals-pink: #E0479E;
Spacing & Grid

Spacing Scale

9-step spacing scale based on a 4px base unit. Always use these tokens — never arbitrary values.

--space-1
4px · Micro gaps, icon-text pairing
--space-2
8px · Badge padding, tight label gaps
--space-3
12px · Nav item gaps, inline groups
--space-4
16px · Card padding, form item spacing
--space-5
24px · Component gaps, card grids
--space-6
32px · Section padding, panel gaps
--space-7
48px · Large section gaps
--space-8
64px · Page section padding
--space-9
96px · Hero sections, major breaks
Components

Buttons & CTAs

Five button variants for different contexts and hierarchies.

/* Button base class */
.btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 10px 22px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-full);
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  transition: var(--transition);
}

/* Primary — dark green with gold text */
.btn-primary { background: var(--evergreen); color: var(--gold-leaf); }

/* Gold CTA — high emphasis */
.btn-gold    { background: var(--gold-leaf); color: var(--evergreen); }

/* Outline — secondary actions */
.btn-outline { background: transparent; border: 2px solid var(--evergreen); }

/* GALS — co-brand CTA */
.btn-gals    { background: var(--gals-pink); color: white; }

/* Ghost — on dark backgrounds */
.btn-ghost   { border: 2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.4); color: var(--gold-leaf); }
Components

Badges & Pills

For status labels, program tags, and metadata.

RootWork Program Georgia Promise Eligible GALS Foundation STEAM Certified Saturday Enrichment 
.badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-full);
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.badge-green { background: rgba(8,42,25,0.08); color: var(--evergreen); }
.badge-gold  { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.12); color: #8A6A10; }
.badge-pink  { background: rgba(224,71,158,0.1); color: var(--gals-pink); }
Components

Cards & Panels

Program Card
After-school STEAM enrichment using the RootWork 5Rs framework. Open to Georgia Promise Scholarship participants.
STEAM Promise Eligible
GALS Program Card
Girls achieving life success through entrepreneurship, financial literacy, and innovation leadership. GALS Foundation–sponsored cohort.
GALS Foundation
Dark Panel Card
Used in hero sections, feature callouts, and highlighted program stats on dark backgrounds.
.brand-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  padding: var(--space-5);
  border-left: 4px solid var(--gold-leaf); /* RWFW accent */
}
/* GALS variant: change left border */
.brand-card.gals { border-left-color: var(--gals-pink); }
Components

Headers & Navigation

Standard co-branded header for web apps and program portals.

×
RootWork Learning Hub
Dashboard Programs Resources Sign In 
<!-- Co-branded app header -->
<header class="co-brand-header">
  <div class="header-logos">
    <img src="gals-logo.png" alt="GALS Foundation" width="32">
    <span class="divider-x">×</span>
    <img src="rwfw-logo.png" alt="RootWork Framework" width="32">
  </div>
  <nav class="header-nav">...</nav>
</header>

.co-brand-header {
  background: var(--evergreen);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 12px var(--space-6);
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gold-leaf);
}
.divider-x {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  color: var(--gold-leaf);
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

Components

Alerts & Callouts

For notices, program eligibility callouts, and important contextual information.

Georgia Promise Scholarship: This program is approved for Georgia Promise Scholarship funding. Eligible students receive up to $6,000 per academic year. Check your eligibility →
RootWork Certified: All curriculum and facilitation in this program follows the RootWork Framework 5Rs methodology and TRACE Innovation Cycle. Trauma-informed and neuroscience-aligned.
GALS Foundation Cohort: This session is sponsored by the GALS Foundation. Priority enrollment available for girls ages 10–18 in the Savannah service area. 
.alert       { border-radius: var(--radius-md); padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-5); border-left: 4px solid; }
.alert-gold  { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); border-color: var(--gold-leaf); }
.alert-green { background: rgba(8,42,25,0.05); border-color: var(--leaf); }
.alert-pink  { background: rgba(224,71,158,0.06); border-color: var(--gals-pink); }
Brand Elements

The 5Rs Icon System

Five sequenced icons representing the neurologically grounded pedagogical framework. Each has a dedicated semantic color. Always display in sequence: Root → Regulate → Reflect → Restore → Reconnect.

Root
Identity, belonging, and psychological safety before content is introduced.
Regulate
Cognitive and emotional readiness for engagement and academic tasks.
Reflect
Metacognition — how and why one learns. Academic identity formation.
Restore
Resilience through challenge, productive failure, and iterative growth.
Reconnect
Return knowledge to the community. Learners as knowledge producers.
/* 5Rs semantic color map */
const RS_COLORS = {
  root:      '#0D3B22',
  regulate:  '#1C4D36',
  reflect:   '#1E3A5F',
  restore:   '#5C3200',
  reconnect: '#3A1550',
};

/* CSS variables */
--root-color:      #0D3B22;
--regulate-color:  #1C4D36;
--reflect-color:   #1E3A5F;
--restore-color:   #5C3200;
--reconnect-color: #3A1550;
Co-Branding Rules

Usage Guidelines

Governing principles for all GALS Foundation × RWFW co-branded outputs.

✓ Do
  • Always display GALS logo before RWFW logo (GALS is Lead Sponsor)
  • Separate logos with the "×" divider in Playfair Display Bold
  • Use GALS pink (#E0479E) exclusively for GALS-specific CTAs and callouts
  • Maintain equal visual weight between both logos in all lockups
  • Credit GALS Foundation as "Lead Sponsor" in all proposal and program materials
  • Use gold (#C9A84C) as the universal accent tying both brands together
  • Apply the co-brand header on all shared digital platforms
  • Keep "Growing and Loving Sisters" as the full name of GALS Foundation
✗ Don't
  • Never place logos on busy photo backgrounds without a dark overlay
  • Never use "GALs" to refer to Guardians ad Litem in co-branded materials
  • Never alter logo colors, proportions, or add drop shadows to logos
  • Never use the GALS pink for RWFW-only materials
  • Never stack logos without the "×" divider between them
  • Never use sans-serif fonts for display headings — always Playfair Display
  • Never display 5Rs icons out of sequence without explicit justification
  • Never use arbitrary color values — always use CSS variable tokens
Critical Distinction: "GALS Foundation" = Growing and Loving Sisters (nonprofit, Carla Peterson, Founder & Executive Director). "GALs" = Guardians ad Litem (legal role). These are entirely separate entities. Never conflate in any document, app, or digital product.
Design Tokens

Full CSS Variables File

Copy this block into any project's root stylesheet to immediately activate the full co-brand token system.

/* ============================================================
   GALS Foundation × RootWork Framework
   Co-Brand Design Tokens — v1.0
   Copy into :root {} in your global stylesheet
   ============================================================ */

:root {

  /* Primary Palette */
  --evergreen:      #082A19;
  --mid-green:      #1A4A2E;
  --leaf:           #2D5E4E;
  --gold-leaf:      #C9A84C;
  --gold-light:     #E8D484;
  --canvas-light:   #F2F4CA;
  --canvas-mid:     #DFE1B0;

  /* GALS Accent */
  --gals-pink:      #E0479E;
  --gals-pink-lt:   #F27EC3;
  --gals-dark:      #1A0010;

  /* Neutral Scale */
  --white:          #FFFFFF;
  --off-white:      #F8F9F2;
  --gray-900:       #1A1A1A;
  --gray-700:       #3A3A3A;
  --gray-500:       #767676;
  --gray-200:       #E4E8E4;
  --gray-100:       #F0F4F0;

  /* 5Rs Semantic Colors */
  --root-color:     #0D3B22;
  --regulate-color: #1C4D36;
  --reflect-color:  #1E3A5F;
  --restore-color:  #5C3200;
  --reconnect-color:#3A1550;

  /* Typography */
  --font-display:   'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
  --font-body:      'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-mono:      'DM Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;

  /* Spacing Scale (4px base) */
  --space-1: 4px;  --space-2: 8px;  --space-3: 12px;
  --space-4: 16px; --space-5: 24px; --space-6: 32px;
  --space-7: 48px; --space-8: 64px; --space-9: 96px;

  /* Border Radius */
  --radius-sm:   4px;
  --radius-md:   8px;
  --radius-lg:   16px;
  --radius-xl:   24px;
  --radius-full: 9999px;

  /* Shadows */
  --shadow-sm:   0 1px 3px rgba(8,42,25,0.12);
  --shadow-md:   0 4px 12px rgba(8,42,25,0.15);
  --shadow-lg:   0 8px 32px rgba(8,42,25,0.18);
  --shadow-gold: 0 4px 20px rgba(201,168,76,0.25);

  /* Transitions */
  --transition:      200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  --transition-slow: 400ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);

}
Developer Config

Tailwind CSS Config

Drop this into your tailwind.config.js to extend Tailwind with the full co-brand token system. 

// tailwind.config.js — GALS × RWFW Co-Brand Extension
module.exports = {
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        evergreen:  '#082A19',
        'mid-green': '#1A4A2E',
        leaf:       '#2D5E4E',
        gold: {
          DEFAULT: '#C9A84C',
          light:   '#E8D484',
        },
        canvas: {
          light:   '#F2F4CA',
          mid:     '#DFE1B0',
        },
        gals: {
          pink:    '#E0479E',
          'pink-lt': '#F27EC3',
        },
        rs: {
          root:      '#0D3B22',
          regulate:  '#1C4D36',
          reflect:   '#1E3A5F',
          restore:   '#5C3200',
          reconnect: '#3A1550',
        },
      },
      fontFamily: {
        display: ['Playfair Display', 'Georgia', 'serif'],
        body:    ['DM Sans', 'system-ui', 'sans-serif'],
        mono:    ['DM Mono', 'Courier New', 'monospace'],
      },
      borderRadius: {
        full: '9999px',
      },
      boxShadow: {
        gold: '0 4px 20px rgba(201,168,76,0.25)',
        brand: '0 8px 32px rgba(8,42,25,0.18)',
      },
    },
  },
};

/* Usage examples:
   bg-evergreen text-gold        → primary surfaces
   bg-gold text-evergreen        → CTAs
   text-gals-pink                → GALS-specific elements
   bg-rs-root / bg-rs-regulate   → 5Rs cards
   font-display                  → headings
   shadow-gold                   → hover states
*/
